ucs.title: [LLM] APT10 (Stone Panda) DLL side-loading via signed binaries dropping ANEL/RedLeaves/PlugX
ucs.description: Hunts APT10's signature execution chain: abuse of legitimately-signed binaries (jjs.exe, GUP.exe, vsodscpl.exe, mcoemcpy.exe, sylauncher.exe) to side-load malicious DLLs (UPPERCUT/ANEL, ChChes, RedLeaves, QuasarRAT loaders) from non-standard directories, often after a spearphish drops a self-extracting archive containing all three components.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name IN ("jjs.exe","GUP.exe","vsodscpl.exe","mcoemcpy.exe","sylauncher.exe","MsMpEng.exe","hkcmd.exe","PresentationHost.exe") AND NOT (Processes.process_path IN ("*\\Program Files\\*","*\\Program Files (x86)\\*","*\\Windows\\System32\\*")) by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.process_path Processes.parent_process Processes.process_id
| `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)`
| join type=inner dest process_id [| tstats summariesonly=true values(Filesystem.file_path) as loaded_dll values(Filesystem.file_name) as dll_name from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where Filesystem.file_name="*.dll" AND NOT (Filesystem.file_path IN ("*\\Windows\\*","*\\Program Files*")) by Filesystem.dest Filesystem.process_id]
| where match(loaded_dll, "(?i)\\\\(ProgramData|Users\\\\Public|AppData\\\\Roaming|Temp|Intel|PerfLogs)\\\\")
| `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
ucs.kql:
let signed_lolbins = dynamic(["jjs.exe","GUP.exe","vsodscpl.exe","mcoemcpy.exe","sylauncher.exe","MsMpEng.exe","hkcmd.exe","PresentationHost.exe","iviewers.exe"]);
let susp_paths = dynamic(["\\programdata\\","\\users\\public\\","\\appdata\\roaming\\","\\appdata\\local\\temp\\","\\perflogs\\","\\intel\\"]);
DeviceProcessEvents
| where FileName in~ (signed_lolbins)
| where FolderPath !startswith "C:\\Program Files" and FolderPath !startswith "C:\\Windows\\System32"
| extend lpath = tolower(FolderPath)
| where lpath has_any (susp_paths)
| join kind=inner (
    DeviceImageLoadEvents
    | where FileName endswith ".dll"
    | where FolderPath !startswith "C:\\Windows" and FolderPath !startswith "C:\\Program Files"
    | project DeviceId, InitiatingProcessId, LoadedDll=FileName, LoadedDllPath=FolderPath, LoadTime=Timestamp
) on $left.DeviceId == $right.DeviceId, $left.ProcessId == $right.InitiatingProcessId
| where abs(datetime_diff('second', LoadTime, Timestamp)) < 120
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, FolderPath, ProcessCommandLine, LoadedDll, LoadedDllPath, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| sort by Timestamp desc
ucs.rationale: DLL side-loading via specifically-named signed binaries dropped outside of their installation directories is one of the most consistently re-used APT10 TTPs across Operation Cloud Hopper, A41APT, and the Cicada/menuPass campaigns. PwC, Symantec, Kaspersky and Secureworks all documented Stone Panda dropping triplets (legit EXE + malicious DLL + encoded payload) into ProgramData/Public/PerfLogs as t

ucs.title: [LLM] APT10 Cloud Hopper MSP pivot: trusted-relationship RDP/WMI followed by NTDS extraction
ucs.description: Hunts APT10's Cloud Hopper / Operation Soft Cell pattern of pivoting from a compromised MSP (T1199) into a customer tenant via RDP or WMI using a service/admin account, then dumping NTDS.dit using ntdsutil + vssadmin or wmic shadowcopy — the classic Stone Panda lateral-then-credential-harvest sequence on domain controllers.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Authentication.src) as src_ip values(Authentication.user) as user from datamodel=Authentication where Authentication.action=success AND Authentication.authentication_method IN ("RemoteInteractive","Network") AND (Authentication.dest_category="domain_controller" OR Authentication.dest="*DC*") by Authentication.dest Authentication.user Authentication.src
| `drop_dm_object_name(Authentication)`
| join type=inner dest [| tstats summariesonly=true values(Processes.process) as ntds_cmd values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process_name IN ("ntdsutil.exe","vssadmin.exe","wmic.exe","esentutl.exe","diskshadow.exe") AND (Processes.process="*ntds*" OR Processes.process="*shadow*" OR Processes.process="*ifm*" OR Processes.process="*create full*")) OR (Processes.process_name="cmd.exe" AND Processes.process="*\\\\admin$\\*") by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process_name _time]
| eval pivot_to_dump_seconds = abs(_time - lastTime)
| where pivot_to_dump_seconds < 3600
| stats values(src_ip) as src_ip values(user) as user values(ntds_cmd) as ntds_cmd values(parent) as parent by dest firstTime lastTime
| `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
ucs.kql:
let dc_logons =
    IdentityLogonEvents
    | where ActionType == "LogonSuccess"
    | where LogonType in ("RemoteInteractive","Network")
    | where DeviceName has_any ("DC0","DC1","DC2","-DC-","PDC","ADC")
    | project LogonTime=Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, AccountDomain, IPAddress, LogonType;
let ntds_dump =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where (FileName in~ ("ntdsutil.exe","diskshadow.exe","esentutl.exe") and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("ntds","ifm","create full","shadow"))
        or (FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "create shadow")
        or (FileName =~ "wmic.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "shadowcopy" and ProcessCommandLine has "call create")
        or (FileName =~ "cmd.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "\\windows\\ntds\\ntds.dit")
    | project DumpTime=Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessParentFileName;
dc_logons
| join kind=inner ntds_dump on DeviceName
| where datetime_diff('minute', DumpTime, LogonTime) between (0 .. 60)
| extend SuspiciousMSPSource = iff(ipv4_is_private(IPAddress) == false, "EXTERNAL_PIVOT", "INTERNAL")
| project LogonTime, DumpTime, DeviceName, AccountName, AccountDomain, IPAddress, SuspiciousMSPSource, FileName, ProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessParentFileName
| sort by DumpTime desc
ucs.rationale: Cloud Hopper (PwC/BAE 2017, US DoJ 2018 indictment of APT10/Stone Panda) and follow-on intrusions documented by Secureworks (Bronze Riverside) showed the same end-to-end behaviour: APT10 used compromised MSP credentials to RDP/WMI into customer DCs and ran ntdsutil 'ifm create full' or vssadmin shadow-copy to extract NTDS.dit for offline cracking.
